/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HelloTriangle.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloTriangle.dir/glad.c.o -o HelloTriangle   -L/Users/tachibis/LocalDocuments/OpenGL/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/tachibis/LocalDocuments/OpenGL/lib -lglfw3 -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit
